title: C002: Container Image CI Workflow
description:
**Size:** đź”¨ medium
**Category:** infrastructure
**Priority:** high
**Feature ID:** S007

## Summary

Create `.github/workflows/build-images.yaml` implementing S007 from the project plan. The workflow builds OpenStack service container images (starting with Keystone) as multi-arch builds (`linux/amd64`, `linux/arm64`) and pushes them to GHCR. Base images (`python-base`, `venv-builder`) are built as prerequisite jobs within the same workflow and passed to service builds via `--build-context` overrides pointing at `docker-image://ghcr.io/...` refs. The workflow uses a matrix strategy over services and releases, resolves upstream source refs from `releases/<release>/source-refs.yaml` (currently `keystone: "28.0.0"`), applies patches and constraint overrides conditionally, and tags images with composite format `<service>:<upstream-version>-p<N>-<branch>-<sha>` plus standalone `<upstream-version>` and `<sha>` tags. A smoke test job validates the built image by running `keystone-manage --version`.

On PRs, base images are always pushed to GHCR (small, shared, required for `docker-image://` build-context resolution), while service images build single-arch (`linux/amd64`) with `--load` for local smoke testing without registry push. On push events, all images build multi-arch and push to GHCR.

## Scope

**Included:**
- Workflow file `.github/workflows/build-images.yaml` with SPDX header matching `ci.yaml` convention (`Copyright 2026 SAP SE or an SAP affiliate company`, Apache-2.0), quoted `"on"` key, top-level `permissions:` block, and three jobs
- All jobs use `runs-on: ubuntu-latest` matching `ci.yaml` convention; `timeout-minutes` set per job (base and service builds need higher than `ci.yaml`'s 10 min â€” 30 min recommended for multi-arch builds)
- `build-base-images` job: sequential build of `python-base` (from `images/python-base/`, base `ubuntu:noble`) then `venv-builder` (from `images/venv-builder/`, with `--build-context python-base=docker-image://...`); always multi-arch; always push to GHCR (including PRs â€” required for `docker-image://` refs in service builds); outputs image refs with digest (`ghcr.io/c5c3/python-base@sha256:...`) for downstream jobs
- `build-service-images` job (matrix over `service: [keystone]` Ă— `release: ["2025.2"]`): resolves ref from `releases/<release>/source-refs.yaml` via `yq` (`.keystone` yields `"28.0.0"`); checks out `openstack/<service>` at resolved ref into `src/<service>`; applies patches conditionally with `git -C src/<service> apply patches/<service>/<release>/*.patch` (guarded by `hashFiles` â€” currently no `patches/` directory exists, step is no-op); runs `scripts/apply-constraint-overrides.sh <release>` (idempotent, exits 0 when `overrides/<release>/constraints.txt` absent); builds with `docker/build-push-action`
- **PR behavior**: single-arch `linux/amd64` with `load: true` (image available locally for smoke test), `push: false`
- **Push behavior**: multi-arch `linux/amd64,linux/arm64` with `push: true`
- Four `--build-context` overrides for service builds: `python-base=docker-image://ghcr.io/c5c3/python-base@sha256:...`, `venv-builder=docker-image://ghcr.io/c5c3/venv-builder@sha256:...`, `<service>=src/<service>`, `upper-constraints=releases/<release>/`
- Multi-arch via `docker/setup-buildx-action` + `docker/build-push-action` for `linux/amd64,linux/arm64`
- GHCR login with `docker/login-action` using `GITHUB_TOKEN`
- Tag schema: composite `<upstream-version>-p<N>-<branch>-<sha>` (e.g., `keystone:28.0.0-p0-main-a1b2c3d`), plus standalone `<upstream-version>` tag (e.g., `keystone:28.0.0`) and `<sha>` tag (e.g., `keystone:a1b2c3d`)
- Patch count derivation: `p0` when no `patches/<service>/<release>/` directory or no `.patch` files; `pN` = count of `.patch` files
- Branch name sanitization for Docker tag compatibility (replace `/` with `-`, e.g., `stable/2025.2` â†’ `stable-2025.2`)
- `smoke-test` job: depends on `build-service-images`; on PRs uses locally loaded image, on push pulls from GHCR; runs `docker run --rm <image> keystone-manage --version`; non-zero exit fails the workflow
- Triggers: `push` to `main` and `stable/**` branches, `pull_request`
- GHA layer caching (`cache-from: type=gha`, `cache-to: type=gha,mode=max`)
- Concurrency control matching `ci.yaml` pattern (`group: ${{ github.ref }}-${{ github.workflow }}`, `cancel-in-progress` on PR only)
- Actions pinned to full commit SHAs with version comments (matching `ci.yaml` convention, e.g., `actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6`)
- Permissions: top-level `contents: read`, `packages: write` (top-level block matching `ci.yaml` convention â€” `packages: write` added for GHCR push)

**Excluded:**
- SBOM generation and attestation (`architecture/docs/08-container-images/04-sbom.md` documents CycloneDX via `anchore/sbom-action` + `actions/attest-sbom` â€” separate feature requiring `id-token: write` and `attestations: write` permissions)
- Renovate custom regex managers for `source-refs.yaml` (`architecture/docs/08-container-images/02-versioning.md` documents planned config â€” separate concern, current `renovate.json` only has `config:recommended`)
- Operator image builds (S017/S018 â€” separate scope, different Dockerfiles in `operators/`)
- Helm chart packaging and push (S018 scope)
- Library patch checkout and build-context injection (Level 2 patches from `architecture/docs/08-container-images/03-patching.md` â€” no library patches exist yet, YAGNI)
- OVN/OVS build pipeline (architecture docs mark as TODO)
- E2E or integration testing beyond the smoke test (separate workflow scope)
- Adding new services beyond keystone to the matrix (matrix is extensible, but only `images/keystone/Dockerfile` exists today)
- `docker-build` Makefile target update (currently a stub error referencing S006 â€” can be updated separately)
- `extra-packages.yaml` consumption (declarative config consumed by Dockerfiles directly, not by the workflow)

## Visualization

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    subgraph Triggers
        PR["Pull Request"]
        Push["Push main / stable/**"]
    end

    subgraph BaseJob["Job: build-base-images"]
        BCheckout["Checkout repo"]
        BBuildx["Setup Buildx"]
        BLogin["Login to GHCR"]
        BB1["Build + push python-base"]
        BB2["Build + push venv-builder"]
        BCheckout --> BBuildx --> BLogin --> BB1 --> BB2
    end

    subgraph Matrix["Job: build-service-images #40;matrix: service x release#41;"]
        Checkout["Checkout C5C3 repo"]
        Resolve["Resolve source ref #40;yq .keystone#41;"]
        CheckoutSrc["Checkout openstack/keystone at ref"]
        Patches["Apply patches #40;conditional, currently no-op#41;"]
        Overrides["Apply constraint overrides #40;idempotent#41;"]
        PatchCount["Derive patch count #40;pN#41;"]
        TagCalc["Calculate tags"]
        Buildx["Setup Docker Buildx"]
        Login["Login to GHCR"]
        Build["Build image with 4 build-contexts"]
        PushDecision{"PR?"}
        LoadLocal["load: true #40;amd64 only#41;"]
        PushGHCR["push: true #40;amd64+arm64#41;"]

        Checkout --> Resolve --> CheckoutSrc --> Patches --> Overrides --> PatchCount --> TagCalc --> Buildx --> Login --> Build --> PushDecision
        PushDecision -->|yes| LoadLocal
        PushDecision -->|no| PushGHCR
    end

    subgraph Smoke["Job: smoke-test"]
        Pull["Load or pull built image"]
        RunTest["docker run keystone-manage --version"]
        Pull --> RunTest
    end

    PR --> BaseJob
    Push --> BaseJob
    BaseJob --> Matrix
    Matrix --> Smoke
```

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    subgraph BuildContexts["Named Build Contexts"]
        BC1["python-base = docker-image://ghcr.io/c5c3/python-base@sha256:..."]
        BC2["venv-builder = docker-image://ghcr.io/c5c3/venv-builder@sha256:..."]
        BC3["keystone = src/keystone"]
        BC4["upper-constraints = releases/2025.2/"]
    end

    subgraph Dockerfile["images/keystone/Dockerfile"]
        S1["FROM venv-builder AS build"]
        S2["RUN uv pip install --constraint ... keystone"]
        S3["FROM python-base"]
        S4["COPY --from=build /var/lib/openstack"]
    end

    subgraph Tags["Image Tags #40;3 per service#41;"]
        T1["keystone:28.0.0-p0-main-a1b2c3d"]
        T2["keystone:28.0.0"]
        T3["keystone:a1b2c3d"]
    end

    BC1 --> S3
    BC2 --> S1
    BC3 --> S2
    BC4 --> S2
    Dockerfile --> Tags --> GHCR["ghcr.io/c5c3/keystone"]
```

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant GHA as GitHub Actions
    participant YQ as yq
    participant Git as git
    participant Script as apply-constraint-overrides.sh
    participant Buildx as Docker Buildx
    participant GHCR as ghcr.io

    GHA->>YQ: Read releases/2025.2/source-refs.yaml
    YQ-->>GHA: keystone = "28.0.0"
    GHA->>Git: checkout openstack/keystone@28.0.0 into src/keystone
    GHA->>Git: apply patches/keystone/2025.2/*.patch #40;if any#41;
    GHA->>Script: apply-constraint-overrides.sh 2025.2
    Script-->>GHA: constraints updated #40;or no-op#41;
    GHA->>GHA: Derive tags #40;28.0.0-p0-main-a1b2c3d, 28.0.0, a1b2c3d#41;
    GHA->>Buildx: Build with 4 build-contexts
    alt Push event
        Buildx->>GHCR: Push ghcr.io/c5c3/keystone #40;multi-arch#41;
        GHA->>GHCR: Pull image for smoke test
    else PR event
        Buildx->>GHA: Load image locally #40;amd64 only#41;
    end
    GHA->>GHA: docker run keystone-manage --version
```

## Key Components

- **`.github/workflows/build-images.yaml`**: Workflow file with SPDX header, quoted `"on"` key, triggers (`push: [main, stable/**]` + `pull_request`), concurrency control (matching `ci.yaml`: `group: ${{ github.ref }}-${{ github.workflow }}`, cancel-in-progress on PR), top-level permissions (`contents: read`, `packages: write`), three jobs on `runs-on: ubuntu-latest`
- **`build-base-images` job**: Sequential build of `python-base` (from `images/python-base/`, base `ubuntu:noble`) then `venv-builder` (from `images/venv-builder/`, with `--build-context python-base=docker-image://...`); always multi-arch; always pushed to GHCR (even on PRs â€” required for `docker-image://` refs in downstream service builds); outputs image refs with digest for downstream consumption; `timeout-minutes: 30`
- **`build-service-images` job (matrix)**: Matrix over `service: [keystone]` Ă— `release: ["2025.2"]`; resolves ref from `releases/<release>/source-refs.yaml` via `yq` (`.keystone` yields `"28.0.0"`); checks out `openstack/<service>` at that ref into `src/<service>`; applies patches with `git -C src/<service> apply patches/<service>/<release>/*.patch` (conditional on `hashFiles` â€” currently no patches exist, step is no-op); runs `scripts/apply-constraint-overrides.sh <release>` (idempotent, exits 0 when `overrides/<release>/constraints.txt` absent); builds with `docker/build-push-action` passing four `build-contexts`; on push: multi-arch with three tags; on PR: single-arch `amd64` with `--load`; `timeout-minutes: 30`
- **Tag derivation step**: Reads upstream version from `source-refs.yaml` via `yq`; counts `.patch` files in `patches/<service>/<release>/` (defaulting to `p0` when directory absent); sanitizes branch name (`${GITHUB_REF_NAME//\//-}`); extracts 7-char short SHA; assembles composite `<version>-p<N>-<branch>-<sha>` plus standalone `<version>` and `<sha>` tags
- **`smoke-test` job**: Depends on `build-service-images`; on PRs uses locally loaded image, on push pulls from GHCR; runs `docker run --rm <image> keystone-manage --version`; non-zero exit fails the workflow; `timeout-minutes: 10`
- **Action version pinning**: All third-party actions pinned to full commit SHAs with version comments matching `ci.yaml` convention (e.g., `actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6`, `docker/build-push-action@<sha> # v6`)
